description: Describe what your business does, who it serves, and what makes it different.

services.name: Primary Service
services.description: Describe the main service or product callers usually ask about.

policies.title: Cancellation Policy
policies.content: Add a caller-safe summary of your cancellation or refund policy.

faqs.question: What do you help customers with?
faqs.answer: Add an approved FAQ answer the assistant can say aloud on calls.

wordsToUse: let me check that for you
samplePhrases: Thanks for calling. I can help with that.
Let me walk you through the next step.

escalationRules.trigger: Caller asks for a manager or sensitive account-specific information
escalationRules.action: Take a message or transfer to an approved human contact.
